channel.title: GitHub CLI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub CLI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub CLI: Opt-out usage telemetry
item.description:
GitHub CLI v2.91.0 adds pseudonymous usage telemetry by default. The release notes say the data is used to improve the product and is opt-out.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Manage agent skills with GitHub CLI
item.description:
GitHub CLI now includes gh skill, a new command for discovering and installing agent skills. The post says it is intended to make managing skills easier for AI coding agents.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: New PGP signing key for GitHub CLI Linux packages
item.description:
GitHub CLI’s Linux package repositories now use an updated PGP keyring that includes both the existing signing key and a replacement key. The change is meant to support package signing continuity and will matter if you refresh or verify repository keys.

  • Source: GitHub
